description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly white exterior and metallic gold accents on the heel tab, eyelets, and tongue patch. The shoe features a smooth, matte finish with a subtle texture on the upper, likely made from synthetic leather or coated fabric. The heel and tongue both display shiny gold panels, adding a touch of luxury to the otherwise minimalist design. The sole is thick, flat, and white, providing a clean contrast to the gold details. There are no visible laces, suggesting the shoe is either a slip-on or designed for decorative lacing. The overall appearance is modern and stylish, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A white low-top sneaker with metallic gold accents on the heel, eyelets, and tongue, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a thick white sole. The design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible laces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic gold heel tab and the rounded white sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gold eyelets, smooth white upper, and gold heel accent.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the gold tongue patch, symmetrical gold eyelets, and rounded toe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with gold eyelets and heel accent visible.
